description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python cibuildwheel that builds and uploads Python packages to PyPI. The workflow triggers on push to master, main, develop, and actions_pypi branches, as well as tags matching v*. It also triggers on pull requests to master, main, and develop branches. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: building a source package, building wheels for various Python versions and architectures on Ubuntu, Windows, and macOS, merging the wheel artifacts, and uploading the wheels to PyPI or TestPyPI.
